Welcome to the pre-assessment! To complete your pre-assessment, please click HERE .
This assessment is designed to gauge your current knowledge and understanding.
Once you have finished the pre-assessment, please click the "Complete & Continue" button to
proceed. This will allow you to continue your learning journey and access the next part of the course.
Keep up the great work!
Remember, at the end of this course, this will give you the opportunity to see how far you have come
when you complete the final exam.
www.getwsodo.com
